command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Sakura agent.log: what tool calls did she make at 11:32? ==="
grep -A5 "11:32\|send_message\|telegram_send\|tool_use" /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30 | cut -c1-250

echo ""
echo "=== What tools does Sakura have access to? (esp. send_message / telegram tools) ==="
grep -iE "send_message|telegram.*send|tool.*name|available.*tool" /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Check Sakura's session context files (cached conversation history) ==="
find /home/jose/.hermes -name "*.json" -newer /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /home/jose/.hermes/sessions/ 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Does Sakura's config give her send_message or telegram tools? ==="
grep -iE "send_message\|telegram\|tools\|plugins" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^#" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== Check what Sakura's agent actually sent at 11:32 (full agent turn) ==="
grep -B2 -A10 "11:32:1[0-9]\|11:32:2[0-9]" /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300 | head -50
REMOTE
